overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Horizon Forbidden West) showing a character exploring a tropical beach environment with white sand, distinctive red vegetation, and turquoise water. The character transitions from running on sand to wading in shallow surf, then cuts to a wooden dock area with boats and NPCs during golden hour lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal beach with red vegetation patches

agents.ego_description: running across white sand toward the ocean, passing patches of distinctive red tallgrass

entered.detail: expansive white sandy terrain with visible footprints and ripples
clumps of bright red-orange tallgrass distinctive to the landscape
large weathered rock formations jutting from the sand
calm blue sea meeting the sky with distant landmasses visible

segments.scene_description: The character runs across an expansive white sand beach dotted with vibrant red vegetation patches. Rocky outcrops frame the coastline while the turquoise ocean stretches to the horizon under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow turquoise coastal water along shoreline

events.description: character steps from sand into shallow turquoise ocean water
character slows to a walk and turns to look back at the shoreline and distant mountains

agents.ego_description: wading through crystal-clear shallow water along the beach, observing the waves and coastal scenery

entered.detail: crystal clear shallow sea water with visible sandy bottom and light caustics
gentle waves rolling toward the shore with white foam crests
misty mountain peaks and tall rocky spires visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shallow turquoise water and walks along the shoreline, with waves breaking gently nearby. The camera turns to reveal distant mountain peaks and rocky spires across the bay while the character wades through the clear surf.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing dock with boats and rigging

events.description: scene transitions via dissolve to a wooden dock area with golden hour lighting and different ocean conditions

agents.ego_description: walking along a weathered wooden dock, passing a fishing boat and approaching an NPC villager

notable_agents.action: villager standing on the dock holding a rope or fishing net near a small boat

entered.detail: rustic wooden pier planks with rope coils and fishing equipment
small fishing vessel with green hull and wooden decking moored at the pier
thick ropes and cables stretching across the dock area
wooden buildings and scaffolding built into the coastal cliffs

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a wooden fishing dock during golden hour, with the character walking along weathered planks past a moored boat and rope rigging. An NPC villager stands nearby holding fishing gear, while wooden structures cling to the cliffside in the background and ocean swells move beneath the pier.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from an expansive tropical coastline into a rustic fishing village during the golden hour. It begins with the character running across a white sand beach dotted with vibrant red vegetation and framed by rocky outcrops under a partly cloudy sky. As the character reaches the water's edge, the scene transitions into a walk through shallow turquoise surf, with the camera turning to reveal distant mountain peaks and rocky spires across the bay. The environment then shifts toward a weathered wooden dock, where the lighting warms into a golden glow as the character passes a moored boat and rope rigging. Finally, the movement leads past a villager with fishing gear toward wooden structures clinging to the cliffside while ocean swells roll beneath the pier.
